description:
Forget about sitting, staying, or rolling over. In Angry Dog, you trade the obedience school diploma for a license to cause absolute mayhem. Granny just wants a peaceful afternoon, but you have a bad case of the zoomies and a house full of breakable objects waiting to be smashed. Step into the fur of the neighborhood’s naughtiest canine and turn every room into your personal playground.

Unlike your sneaky feline rivals, you are a wrecking ball of energy. Dash through hallways, knock over expensive vases with your clumsy paws, chew up the furniture, and bark until the windows rattle. The game drops you into a fully interactive 3D environment where almost everything can be destroyed, dragged, or messed with. Your goal is simple: cause enough chaos to fill the meter and drive Granny crazy before she catches you with her broom.
